task_closeout.reason: This report supplies diagnostic evidence for review, but the task registry remains open until an explicit registry reconciliation patch lands.

scope.evaluation_mode: diagnostic classification over current committed RepoBrief/Agent Workbench surfaces

score_scale.0: absent or not useful for the criterion

aggregate_decision.primary_recommendation: Add or reuse a task-filtered Workbench shortlist before adding more raw surfaces.
deprioritize_as_default_required_reading: raw health check arrays when compact projections exist
retrieval metric reports as direct evidence for answer correctness

surface_scores.decision: Keep as the content truth anchor; never replace with sidecars.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Low noise, but weak navigation by itself on large repositories.

surface_scores.decision: Keep as the primary agent front door and task-orientation surface.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Can be overread as repository understanding unless it repeats navigation-only boundaries.

surface_scores.decision: Keep as the artifact inventory and role/authority routing surface.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Mostly structural; not a content-evidence substitute.

surface_scores.decision: Keep and prefer for cited answers and review workflows.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Citation availability does not prove semantic correctness of a claim.

surface_scores.decision: Keep for roadmap/status claims; absence must stay visible.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Claim-to-evidence links are navigation, not automatic proof that claims are true.

surface_scores.decision: Keep as diagnostic gates; expose compact summaries first.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: A pass/warn result can be overread as forensic readiness or repo correctness.

surface_scores.decision: Keep for artifact-surface review and bundle coherence checks.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Surface coherence does not prove artifact content is sufficient or true.

surface_scores.decision: Keep as a low-noise entry map, especially for agents starting from bundles.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: It inventories entry surfaces but does not prove that an agent used them.

surface_scores.decision: Keep only when task-filtered or summarized; do not push raw card volume as required reading.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: High false-confidence and noise risk if relation/proximity cards are read as semantic importance.

surface_scores.decision: Use as opt-in static navigation; require availability/degradation status and non-claims.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Static proximity is often mistaken for runtime dependency, coverage, or change impact.

surface_scores.decision: Promote as a read-only lookup/navigation aid once consumer wiring is reconciled.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Symbol presence does not prove reachability, call graph completeness, or runtime behavior.

surface_scores.decision: Keep as diagnostic measurement, not as a default behavior authorization or answer evidence.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Strong-looking recall/MRR numbers are easy to overread beyond their measured goldset.

surface_scores.decision: Keep for debugging and replay; do not make long traces mandatory reading by default.
surface_scores.noise_or_risk: Useful for diagnosing a session, noisy as general-purpose context.

follow_up_candidates.reason: A compact task-filtered surface shortlist would reduce card/diagnostic noise without changing authority boundaries.
Symbol index has high navigation value but should remain explicitly read-only and non-runtime.
A broad read-only adapter can expose selected helpful surfaces without mirror authority.
